reason: Dashboard Approval page has critical accessibility gaps: (1) one button has no accessible name (empty text, no aria-label/title); (2) zero buttons carry aria-label attributes; (3) all 4 filter select/comboboxes are unlabeled (no aria-label, id, name, or associated label); (4) no live-region elements (aria-live, role=alert, role=status) exist, so screen readers cannot announce status changes. Keyboard navigation passes because interactive elements are native focusable controls with no negative tabindex. Color contrast could not be conclusively verified without an automated audit tool, but sampled text/background pairs included borderline ratios.

frictions.description: agent-browser connect command failed with connection error; had to use --cdp per command instead.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser --cdp http://127.0.0.1:9222 <command> for all interactions.

frictions.description: agent-browser default CDP attachment targeted DevTools page instead of app page.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser tab 1 to switch to the SoftwareSawit tab.

frictions.description: App was already on Dashboard Approval page when connected; expected to start at login page and click guest login.
frictions.resolution: Proceeded with testing the Dashboard Approval page directly since it was already loaded.

frictions.description: agent-browser errors command returned a JSON parse error ("Unexpected token 'H'..."), preventing console error inspection.
